settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configure your AutoSubs preferences and options.

reset.confirm: Are you sure you want to reset all settings, including transcription settings? This action cannot be undone.

restartResolveServer.title: Update installed
restartResolveServer.description: AutoSubs restarted and disconnected from Resolve. In DaVinci Resolve, run Workspace -> Scripts -> AutoSubs again to start the updated Lua server.

importExport.dropHere: Drop file here or click to select

srt.title: Subtitles (.srt)
srt.description: Standard subtitle format for apps like YouTube and VLC. Includes timestamps.

txt.title: Transcript (.txt)
txt.description: Plain text export for LLMs that includes speaker labels when available.

format.customPromptDescription: Add terms, names, or context to guide Whisper.
format.customPromptPlaceholder: E.g. OpenAI, DaVinci Resolve — tutorial about subtitle editing.
format.customPromptLanguageWarning: Write in the same language as your audio — a prompt in a different language can cause incorrect transcription.

censor.title: Censor Words
censor.dialogDescription: Toggle word lists or add custom words to censor in the subtitles.

fileDrop.aria: Drop audio file here or click to select

speakerEditor.title: Edit Speakers
speakerEditor.description: These are the speakers detected in the audio.
speakerEditor.name: Speaker Name

englishOnly.title: English-Only Models
englishOnly.description: Show specialised English models with higher accuracy for English transcription.

manage.title: Models
manage.description: Delete cached models to free up disk space.
manage.confirmBody: This will delete the {{model}} model from your device. If you use this model in future it will need to be downloaded again.

diarize.label: Speaker Diarization Model
diarize.details: Used for speaker diarization and labeling.

tiny.label: Whisper Tiny
tiny.details: Fastest transcription with minimal memory. Ideal for quick drafts.

tiny_en.label: Whisper Tiny
tiny_en.details: Fastest English transcription with minimal memory. Ideal for quick drafts.

base.label: Whisper Base
base.details: Reliable transcription with low memory requirements. Great for everyday use.

base_en.label: Whisper Base
base_en.details: Reliable English transcription with low memory. Great for everyday use.

small.label: Whisper Small
small.details: Balanced speed and accuracy with moderate memory. Handles varied accents well.

small_en.label: Whisper Small
small_en.details: Balanced speed and English accuracy with moderate memory. Handles varied accents.

medium.label: Whisper Medium
medium.details: High accuracy transcription with moderate speed and memory. Good for challenging audio.

medium_en.label: Whisper Medium
medium_en.details: High accuracy English transcription with moderate speed. Good for challenging audio.

large_v3_turbo.label: Whisper Large Turbo
large_v3_turbo.details: Excellent accuracy with faster speed than Large model and moderate memory.

large_v3.label: Whisper Large
large_v3.details: Highest accuracy for complex audio, but slower and requires significant memory.

parakeet.label: Parakeet
parakeet.details: Excellent accuracy and speed for European languages.

moonshine_tiny.label: Moonshine Tiny
moonshine_tiny.details: Extremely fast on-device English transcription with minimal resources. Ideal for real-time use.

moonshine_tiny_ar.label: Moonshine Tiny
moonshine_tiny_ar.details: Fast on-device Arabic transcription with minimal resources.

moonshine_tiny_zh.label: Moonshine Tiny
moonshine_tiny_zh.details: Fast on-device Chinese transcription with minimal resources.

moonshine_tiny_ja.label: Moonshine Tiny
moonshine_tiny_ja.details: Fast on-device Japanese transcription with minimal resources.

moonshine_tiny_ko.label: Moonshine Tiny
moonshine_tiny_ko.details: Fast on-device Korean transcription with minimal resources.

moonshine_tiny_uk.label: Moonshine Tiny
moonshine_tiny_uk.details: Fast on-device Ukrainian transcription with minimal resources.

moonshine_tiny_vi.label: Moonshine Tiny
moonshine_tiny_vi.details: Fast on-device Vietnamese transcription with minimal resources.

moonshine_base.label: Moonshine Base
moonshine_base.details: Fast on-device English transcription with better accuracy than Moonshine Tiny.

moonshine_base_es.label: Moonshine Base
moonshine_base_es.details: Fast on-device Spanish transcription with good accuracy.

sense_voice.label: SenseVoice
sense_voice.details: Strong accuracy for Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean and Cantonese.

canary.label: Canary
canary.details: High accuracy across 25 European languages (NVIDIA NeMo Canary).

cohere.label: Cohere
cohere.details: Large multilingual transcription model from Cohere.

completion.subtitlesReady: Your subtitles are ready to use!
completion.noSpeechDetected: No speech detected. The audio file may be silent or contain no recognizable speech.

empty.noSubtitlesAvailable: Your subtitles will appear here when finished transcribing

gettingStarted.title: Welcome to AutoSubs
gettingStarted.description: Select the language you speak. It will be used for the interface (if available) and transcription.

resolveNote.openResolve: Open DaVinci Resolve and go to:

connection.title: Connection Status
connection.description: This shows whether AutoSubs is connected to DaVinci Resolve. Green means connected and ready to access your timeline.

modeSwitcher.title: Input Mode
modeSwitcher.description: Switch between transcribing a file directly, or extracting audio from a DaVinci Resolve timeline.

modelPicker.title: AI Model
modelPicker.description: Choose the speech recognition model. A model that supports your language has been automatically selected. Different models trade off between speed and accuracy.

audioInput.title: Audio Source
audioInput.description: Select audio tracks from your Resolve timeline, or drop a media file here to transcribe it directly.

controls.title: Transcription Controls
controls.description: Configure language, speaker identification, text formatting, then click Generate Subtitles to start.

history.title: Subtitle History
history.description: Access and search through your saved subtitle documents here.

subtitleHistory.title: Subtitle History
subtitleHistory.delete_description: This will permanently remove the subtitle document from your history. This action cannot be undone.

tooltip.openResolve: Open DaVinci Resolve and go to Workspace → Scripts → AutoSubs

tooltip.openPremiere: Open Premiere Pro to connect automatically.

tooltip.openAfterEffects: Open After Effects to connect automatically.

ready.title: Subtitles Ready
ready.description: Your subtitles have been generated and are ready to be added to the timeline.

conflict.hasConflicts: This track has conflicting clips. Subtitles may overlap with existing content.

phase.launchingHint: We’ll drop a preview caption on a temporary track.
phase.editingBody: A caption has been placed on a new track and opened in the Fusion page. Customise it using the inspector, then come back here.
phase.nameHint: Give it something short and descriptive.

preset.confirmDelete: This preset will be removed from your library. Built-in presets are not affected.
preset.importPlaceholder: Paste the contents of a preset file here…

errors.invalidJson: That doesn’t look like a valid preset file.
errors.captureFailed: Couldn’t read the caption settings from Resolve.
